title: pigea indica
intro: Pigea indica, also known as Neem, is a deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent, belonging to the Meliaceae family. The medicinal properties of Pigea indica lie in its ability to exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pigea indica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and even help in managing diabetes. Herbal preparations of Pigea indica include neem oil, neem leaves, and neem seeds, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
